channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Immigrant detainees sue over 'horrific' conditions at Texas ICE facility
item.description: Immigrant detainees accuse the federal government of 'inhumane' abuse and treatment at Camp East Montana in El Paso, Texas.
item.content:encoded:
Immigrant detainees accuse the federal government of 'inhumane' abuse and treatment at Camp East Montana in El Paso, Texas.

(Image credit: Morgan Lee)
item.dc:creator: Kristin Wright

item.title: Judge agrees to review Trump's $1.8 billion 'anti-weaponization' fund
item.description: The fund has sparked a broad backlash since it was announced earlier this month, exposing fractures within the Republican Party.
item.content:encoded:
The fund has sparked a broad backlash since it was announced earlier this month, exposing fractures within the Republican Party.

(Image credit: China Pool)
item.dc:creator: Bobby Allyn

item.title: PSG wins back-to-back Champions League titles after shootout victory against Arsenal
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.
item.content:encoded:
Paris Saint-Germain has won back-to-back Champions League titles by beating Arsenal on penalties in a dramatic final in Budapest.

(Image credit: Denes Erdos)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Pride celebrations struggle as corporate sponsorships dry up
item.description: Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.
item.content:encoded:
Public support for the LGBTQ+ community by corporations has become politically risky, public relations expert says.

(Image credit: Hannah Frances Johansson)
item.dc:creator: Hannah Frances Johansson

item.title: Carcass of Timmy the humpback whale brought to shore in Denmark
item.description: The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks.
item.content:encoded:
The humpback whale, nicknamed "Timmy" by German media, died following a controversial failed rescue effort. His carcass had been drifting near the Danish shore for two weeks.

(Image credit: Philip Dulian)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Opinion: Pope Leo reminds us of the value of our shared humanity
item.description: Pope Leo's first encyclical voices his concerns about technology and AI. The pope cautions about the illusions AI bots can create, and how important actual human relationships are.
item.content:encoded:
Pope Leo's first encyclical voices his concerns about technology and AI. The pope cautions about the illusions AI bots can create, and how important actual human relationships are.

(Image credit: Alberto Pizzoli)
item.dc:creator: Scott Simon

item.title: Hegseth urges Asian leaders to boost military spending against China
item.description: The U.S. defense secretary said there is "rightful alarm" of China's military build up. But he also struck a more moderate tone on U.S.-China relations – and notably sidestepped bringing up Taiwan.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. defense secretary said there is "rightful alarm" of China's military build up. But he also struck a more moderate tone on U.S.-China relations – and notably sidestepped bringing up Taiwan.

(Image credit: Anupam Nath)
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Pak

item.title: The NTSB tries to keep cockpit audio recordings private. AI is making that harder
item.description: The National Transportation Safety Board temporarily pulled its docket system offline after digital images were used to reconstruct cockpit voice recordings of the pilots in a recent crash.
item.content:encoded:
The National Transportation Safety Board temporarily pulled its docket system offline after digital images were used to reconstruct cockpit voice recordings of the pilots in a recent crash.

(Image credit: Joel Rose)
item.dc:creator: Joel Rose

item.title: Colombia's untapped wonder: The Mavecure Mountains
item.description: Far from Colombia's tourist hubs, the Mavecure Mountains rise from the Amazon jungle. Once off-limits during conflict, they now draw adventurous visitors to rare wildlife, sacred sites and vast views.
item.content:encoded:
Far from Colombia's tourist hubs, the Mavecure Mountains rise from the Amazon jungle. Once off-limits during conflict, they now draw adventurous visitors to rare wildlife, sacred sites and vast views.

(Image credit: John Otis)
item.dc:creator: John Otis

item.title: Myanmar's Min Aung Hlaing takes first foreign tour as leader, with visit to India
item.description: The tour comes as Myanmar's new government tries to consolidate its political position regionally, while continuing to wage a brutal civil war.
item.content:encoded:
The tour comes as Myanmar's new government tries to consolidate its political position regionally, while continuing to wage a brutal civil war.

(Image credit: Aung Shine Oo)
item.dc:creator: Michael Sullivan
